# ArrowUp01

## Tags
filter, sort, ascending, descending, increasing, decreasing, rising, falling, numerical

## Categories
text, layout, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/arrow-up-0-1)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ArrowUp01;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ArrowUp01 { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
